audit_items.proof_trace: Line 103 unconditionally checks `msg.sender != address(s_auction)` before any state change or external call; if true the function reverts with `AccessForbidden()`. `s_auction` is always a valid non-zero address (`_setAuction` enforces this at every write path), so there is no edge case where the check passes vacuously. All execution paths through the single `external` entry point go through this guard.
